title: Modules, Packages, Environments, and Command Lines · Language Clinic: Python Argparse Cli
summary: Turn the reporting pipeline into an installable and repeatable command-line tool. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python argparse cli increment in an installable data-report command. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Build a command-line interface with argparse subcommands, validated options, useful help, standard streams, and exit codes.
Read and author basic pyproject metadata, build-system, script entry point, and tool configuration boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
